name: White Castle and Zucchini Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Set aside 10 White Castle hamburger buns and spread with garlic butter.
2. Place zucchini slices in the bottom of a greased 8-inch x 8-inch square baking dish.
3. Sprinkle zucchini slices with flour.
4. Top with White Castle hamburgers and onions.
5. Add spaghetti sauce.
6. Spread mixture of ricotta cheese and beaten egg over the sauce.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 30 minutes. (If microwaving, use a microwave-safe dish and cook on high for 10 minutes).
9. Let stand for 10 minutes.
10. Broil buns open-faced until toasted.
11. Cut casserole into 5-6 servings.
12. Spoon casserole onto top of buns.
